title: AI field guide: pure context layer, clipboard mode, and parked API follow-up
summary: Fifth structured packet for Eco Explorer. This packet captures the field-guide work imported from the external handoff pack, but grounded for the live repo: the pure context and prompt module is now implemented, clipboard Mode A is the next safe integration step, and direct API mode stays parked until the safer path is proven out.

execution_order.goal: Land the pure field-guide data module and prompt builder with tests.
execution_order.why_now: This is self-contained and already safe to verify without touching the runtime UI.

execution_order.goal: Wire clipboard Mode A into the in-game menu with a short confirmation state.
execution_order.why_now: Clipboard mode is useful immediately and avoids API-key, privacy, and error-handling complexity.

execution_order.goal: Review prompt quality, child readability, and the clipboard UX after menu wiring lands.
execution_order.why_now: The prompt is a teaching surface, so it deserves critique before any network mode is added.

execution_order.goal: Tighten the copied prompt so it avoids undiscovered-name spoilers, reduces hallucination pressure, and gives the failed-copy toast a clearer next step.
execution_order.why_now: Clipboard mode is useful, but it should be safer and more grounded before the project reopens any direct API path.

execution_order.goal: Consider direct API mode only after clipboard mode is solid and privacy safeguards are explicit.
execution_order.why_now: This is more invasive and should remain a follow-up, not the first integration.

guardrails: Keep the context builder pure and deterministic.
Do not let field-guide work leak API keys or prompt contents into debug surfaces.
Do not expose exact undiscovered species names in the copied prompt.
Do not pressure the model to infer unsupported ecological processes from thin local context.
Clipboard Mode A is the default and fallback path.
Do not let the field guide turn into quiz or checklist output.
Science accuracy remains a hard gate for prompt wording and surrounding UX.
acceptance_focus: The pure context layer is tested and stable.
Clipboard Mode A feels native to the current menu flow.
Future field-guide work keeps the cozy tone and improves ecosystem understanding.
handoff_prompt: Read AGENTS.md, .agents/project-memory.md, .agents/work-queue.md, docs/ai-naturalist-design.md, and this packet. The pure field-guide module is already in place. The next safe step is clipboard Mode A through the in-game menu. Keep direct API mode parked until privacy, save, and readability concerns are clearly handled.
